tasks.instruction: On the most recent climate article tagged with policy, post a comment of at least 20 words and upvote the first two existing comments.

target_names: What the 2026 Climate Bill Means for Your City
This breakdown really helped me understand where the funding is going and why transit upgrades matter so much for emissions.
Curious how smaller cities with tight budgets are supposed to meet these building upgrade timelines. Any examples of successful funding partnerships?

expected_values.posted_comment_text: I appreciate how this article explains the policy in practical terms and gives clear examples of how individuals and communities can get involved in making a real difference.
